# Terraform AWS ECS + Lambda Platform


## Architecture Overview

- AWS VPC (network isolation)
- ECS Fargate (containerized services)
- AWS Lambda (event processing)
- SQS (event-driven messaging)
- IAM (least privilege access)
- CloudWatch (logging & monitoring)
- GitHub Actions (CI/CD)

This project demonstrates a production-style, event-driven AWS platform built using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), focusing on scalability, security, and operational reliability.
